calculator.overnightMessage: The end time is earlier than the start time. We automatically added 24 hours to complete the calculations.

howItWorks.title: How the Calculations Work
howItWorks.description: We make calculating shifts straightforward. Here is a breakdown of how the math and automatic features operate behind the scenes.
howItWorks.step1Description: Enter your starting and ending hours. The parser accepts standard colons (9:00) or raw digits (1730 to mean 17:30). AM/PM values are configured with a single click.
howItWorks.step2Description: Unpaid lunches or break intervals are entered directly in minutes. The calculator converts this duration into hours and deducts it from the gross elapsed time automatically.
howItWorks.step3Description: If the end time is chronologically earlier than the start time (e.g., 10:00 PM to 6:00 AM), our logic automatically detects a midnight crossover and adjusts the calculation without requiring user intervention.
howItWorks.step4Description: Payroll systems rely on decimal hours. We divide total minutes by 60 and round to two decimal places. For example, a shift of 8h 15m translates to 8.25 hours.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions regarding work hours tracking and payroll calculations.
faq.q1: How do I convert hours and minutes to decimal hours?
faq.a1: To convert minutes to decimal hours, divide the minutes by 60. For example: 15 minutes = 15 / 60 = 0.25 hours, 30 minutes = 30 / 60 = 0.50 hours, 45 minutes = 45 / 60 = 0.75 hours. Then, add the result back to your whole hours. If you worked 8 hours and 15 minutes, your decimal hours would be 8.25 hours.
faq.q2: How does automatic overnight shift detection work?
faq.a2: When you enter an end time that is chronologically earlier than your start time (for example, starting at 10:00 PM and ending at 6:00 AM), the calculator automatically assumes a midnight crossover. It adds 24 hours to the end time to compute the elapsed shift duration as 8.00 hours, rather than resulting in a negative total.
faq.q3: Why do employers require decimal hours for payroll?
faq.a3: Decimal hours are much easier to multiply by an hourly rate of pay. If your pay is $20.00/hour and you work 7 hours and 45 minutes, multiplying 20 * 7:45 directly is mathematically incorrect. Instead, you convert 45 minutes to 0.75, resulting in 7.75 hours. The calculation becomes a simple multiplication: $20.00 * 7.75 = $155.00.
faq.q4: Is my personal or timesheet data secure on this page?
faq.a4: Yes, your data is completely secure. All calculations, including time parsing and weekly sheet aggregations, are executed locally on your client machine using JavaScript. No timesheet information, shift records, or personal entries are sent or stored on our servers.

seoContent.title: The Best Free Work Hours Calculator for Accurate Time Tracking
seoContent.p1: Our work hours calculator is the most reliable online tool for tracking your daily and weekly work hours. Whether you are an hourly employee, freelancer, or payroll manager, this free work hours calculator provides instant, accurate results without any registration or downloads. Simply enter your start and end times, add any lunch break or rest periods, and get your total work hours calculated automatically in both standard and decimal format.
seoContent.h3_1: Work Hours Calculator with Lunch Break Support
seoContent.p2: One of the most requested features in any work hours calculator with lunch break is the ability to subtract unpaid break time from your total shift. Our tool makes this effortless. Enter your lunch duration in minutes, and the calculator instantly deducts it from your gross elapsed time. Whether you take a 30-minute lunch or a full hour, the work hours calculator with lunch feature ensures your payroll calculations are always accurate. This is especially useful for employees who need to track net worked time versus gross time on site.
seoContent.h3_2: Weekly Work Hours Calculator for Timesheet Management
seoContent.p3: Tracking a full work week has never been easier. Our weekly work hours calculator lets you log shifts for Monday through Sunday, automatically calculating daily totals and weekly summaries. Enter start times, end times, and break durations for each day, and the weekly work hours calculator instantly computes your total hours worked, decimal hours, and total minutes for the entire week. This makes it the perfect timesheet calculator for employees who need to submit weekly reports to their employer or payroll department.
seoContent.h3_3: Online Work Hours Calculator with Overnight Shift Detection
seoContent.p4: Working night shifts? Our online work hours calculator automatically detects overnight shifts. If your end time is earlier than your start time, the calculator assumes a midnight crossover and adds 24 hours to compute the correct duration. This intelligent feature eliminates manual calculations and prevents errors common in overnight shift tracking. The total work hours calculator handles even the most complex scheduling scenarios with ease.
seoContent.h3_4: Daily Work Hours Calculator with Decimal Conversion
seoContent.p5: Employers and payroll systems require decimal hours for accurate wage calculations. Our daily work hours calculator automatically converts your hours and minutes into decimal format. For example, 8 hours and 30 minutes becomes 8.50 decimal hours, making it simple to multiply by your hourly rate. This work hours calculator app eliminates the common mistakes that occur when manually converting time to payroll-ready numbers.
seoContent.h3_5: Why Choose Our Free Work Hours Calculator?
seoContent.p6: Our free work hours calculator stands out from other time tracking tools for several reasons. First, it works entirely in your browser with no data sent to any server, ensuring complete privacy for your timesheet information. Second, it supports both 12-hour AM/PM and 24-hour military time formats, giving you flexibility in how you enter your shifts. Third, the calculator provides instant copy-to-clipboard functionality, allowing you to quickly paste your work hours summary into emails, spreadsheets, or payroll software. Whether you need a simple work hours calculator app for personal use or a comprehensive tool for your team, our calculator delivers accurate results every time.
seoContent.p7: Start using the most trusted online work hours calculator today. Calculate your shifts, track your weekly hours, and generate payroll-ready decimal values all in one place. No sign-up required, completely free, and designed for accuracy.

about.title: About Work Hours Calculator
about.description: Work Hours Calculator is a free, easy-to-use online tool designed to help employees, freelancers, and payroll managers accurately calculate work hours, track shifts, and generate payroll-ready data.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide a simple, accurate, and completely free work hours calculator that anyone can use without registration or downloads. We believe tracking your work hours should be effortless, transparent, and private.
about.why: We noticed that many existing time tracking tools are either overly complicated, require paid subscriptions, or raise privacy concerns by storing your sensitive payroll data on remote servers. We wanted to create something different — a tool that:
whyList: Works instantly — No sign-up, no downloads, no waiting
Respects your privacy — All calculations happen in your browser; no data leaves your device
Is truly free — No hidden fees, no premium tiers, no limitations
Handles real-world scenarios — Overnight shifts, lunch breaks, weekly timesheets
featuresList: Single Shift Calculator — Quickly calculate hours for a single work shift
Weekly Timesheet — Track and summarize an entire work week
Lunch Break Support — Automatically subtract break time from your total
Overnight Shift Detection — Automatically handles shifts that span midnight
Decimal Hours Conversion — Instantly convert hours and minutes to decimal format for payroll
Pay Calculator — Calculate total earnings based on hourly rate
CSV Export — Export your weekly timesheet to a spreadsheet
Dark Mode — Easy on the eyes for late-night calculations
about.usersIntro: Our tool is used by a wide range of people, including:
usersList: Hourly employees tracking their daily shifts
Small business owners managing staff schedules
Anyone needing quick, accurate time calculations
about.commitment: We are committed to keeping this tool free, fast, and privacy-focused. We will never sell your data because we never collect it. Your work hours and payroll information stay on your device, period.
about.contactText: Have questions, suggestions, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you. Visit our Contact Us page to get in touch.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a question, feedback, suggestion, or just want to say hello, please don't hesitate to reach out.
contact.getInTouchText: The best way to reach us is via email. We typically respond within 24-48 hours during business days.
contact.helpIntro: Feel free to contact us about:
helpList: Bug Reports — Found something broken? Let us know so we can fix it
Feature Requests — Have an idea for a new feature? We're always looking to improve

contact.response: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours on business days. For urgent issues, please include "URGENT" in your subject line.
contact.faq: Before contacting us, you might find your answer in our FAQ section on the homepage. We've answered many common questions there.
contact.privacy: Remember, all calculations on our site are performed locally in your browser. We never see or store any data you enter into the calculator. For more details, see our Privacy Policy.
contact.thankYou: Thank you for using Work Hours Calculator! Your feedback helps us make the tool better for everyone.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Welcome to Work Hours Calculator ("we," "our," or "us"). We are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and work hours calculator tool.
privacy.collect: Our work hours calculator operates entirely within your web browser. We do not collect, store, transmit, or have access to any data you enter into the calculator, including:
privacy.collectNote: All calculations are performed locally on your device using JavaScript. No timesheet information is ever sent to our servers or any third-party service.
privacy.use: Since we do not collect any personal data from the calculator tool, there is no personal information to use, share, or sell. The only data that may be automatically collected includes:
useList: Analytics Data: Anonymous usage statistics (page views, session duration) to help us improve the tool
Technical Data: Browser type, device information, and IP address for security and performance monitoring
privacy.storage: We use browser local storage to save your preferences, such as:
storageList: Your most recent calculator inputs (for convenience)
privacy.storageNote: This data is stored only on your device and can be cleared at any time through your browser settings. We have no access to this local storage data.
privacy.thirdParty: Our website may use the following third-party services:
thirdPartyList: Google Fonts: For web font delivery (subject to Google's Privacy Policy)
Google Analytics: For anonymous usage analytics (if enabled)
privacy.thirdPartyNote: These services have their own privacy policies, and we encourage you to review them.
privacy.security: We implement appropriate security measures to protect the limited data we may collect. However, please note that no method of electronic transmission or storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.children: Our service is not directed to individuals under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
privacy.changes: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
privacy.contact: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please visit our Contact Us page.
